test.name: TC_HOTELS_001 - Verify Hotel Booking with Credit Card Payment

kw.name: Open gother website and login with email
Open web browser by url
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/theemdoppio/Desktop/Automation/GitHub/assign-automation-mar-2026/testcases/web/results/browser/traces/temp/5641a867-20eb-42b4-ad56-a266755c9f0c"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.gother.online/en-us
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

ใช้สำหรับเปิด Web browser Arguments: - ${url} (string) ลิ้งของเว็ปที่ต้องการเปิด: https://google.com - ${supported_browser} (string) ระบบ Browser ที่รองรับ: chromium, firefox, webkit - False (bool) เปิด Browser ในโหมดไร้หน้าต่าง (No GUI): True or False

kw.name: Login with email or mobile no. method
Click login button on header bar
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#signin-and-register-big-button at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Scroll To Element
kw.doc: This method waits for actionability checks, then tries to scroll element into view, unless it is completely visible.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=(//button[contains(text(),'Book now')])[2] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Scroll To Element
kw.doc: This method waits for actionability checks, then tries to scroll element into view, unless it is completely visible.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait until confirm loading is complete
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#loading-gother [alt="loading"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#loading-gother [alt="loading"] at state hidden
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[class$="title-payment-channel"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
